title: Crab Configuration
description: Hand-written JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) for Crab's `config.toml`. Each leaf documents the field's purpose and declares a `default` matching `Config::default()`.

$schema.description: Schema pragma understood by IDE TOML extensions; ignored at runtime.

schemaVersion.description: Settings schema version stamped by the migration layer.

apiProvider.description: LLM provider name used to select the auth + transport backend.

apiBaseUrl.description: Override the provider's HTTP endpoint (e.g. corporate proxy or local Ollama).

apiKeyHelper.description: Path to a script whose stdout is consumed as the API key. The path is configuration; the secret it returns never enters Config.

model.description: Primary model identifier passed to the provider (e.g. `claude-opus-4-7`).

smallModel.description: Smaller/faster model used for auxiliary tasks (compaction, planning).

advisorModel.description: Alias of `smallModel` accepted for CC-compat. Use `smallModel` in new configs.

availableModels.description: Allow-list of models surfaced in the model picker.

modelOverrides.description: Map of alias → concrete model id (e.g. `{ "fast": "claude-haiku" }`).

permissions.description: Tool authorization rules and default mode.

allow.description: Permit-list of tool patterns, e.g. `Bash` or `Bash(git:*)`.

deny.description: Block-list of tool patterns; deny always wins over allow.

defaultMode.description: Fallback mode when no rule matches.

additionalDirectories.description: Extra filesystem roots tools may read/write.

systemPrompt.description: Custom system prompt prepended to every request.

includeGitInstructions.description: Inject git-context block (branch, status, diff) into the system prompt.

customInstructions.description: Additional instructions appended to the system prompt.

additionalProperties.description: MCP server entry. Either `command` (stdio) or `url` (SSE/WebSocket) must be present.

enableAllProjectMcpServers.description: Auto-enable every server defined in the project layer without prompting.

hooks.description: Trigger → list of hook entries (each carries a `command` string).

disableAllHooks.description: Master kill-switch for the hook subsystem.

defaultShell.description: Shell used to execute Bash tool invocations and `apiKeyHelper`.

env.description: Environment variables exported to Crab and to spawned child processes.

language.description: BCP-47 locale tag for UI strings.

respectGitignore.description: Honor `.gitignore` patterns when traversing the project.

autoMemoryDirectory.description: Directory where auto-memory files are written.

enabledPlugins.description: Map of `plugin-id@marketplace-id` keys; value is `true`/`false` or a version-constraint list.

cleanupPeriodDays.description: Days after which idle session/log artifacts are pruned.
